gitTreeStateScope: working tree status excluding generated 2024-env snapshot, reports, paper tables, and paper figures

scope.validationMode: closed historical window, not latest moving data

sources.description: LDA 2024 Q1-Q4 LD-2 activity reports, post-filtered to ENV and EPA-facing contacts when live payloads are available.
sources.statusNotes: lda-first_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended); lda-second_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended); lda-third_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended); lda-fourth_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended)

sources.description: FEC 2024 cycle party committee contributions, OpenFEC Schedule E independent expenditures, electioneering communications, and communication-cost rows when available. Public-financing and opaque-capacity bridge rows are stored in separate panels.
sources.requestTemplate: FEC_CYCLE=2024 FEC_COMMITTEE_ID in C00010603,C00042366,C00000935,C00003418,C00027466,C00075820 plus FEC_ONLY_SCHEDULE_E=1 FEC_INCLUDE_SCHEDULE_E=1 for Schedule E plus FEC_INCLUDE_SCHEDULE_E=0 FEC_INCLUDE_ELECTIONEERING=1 FEC_INCLUDE_COMMUNICATION_COSTS=1 for electoral-communication rows
sources.statusNotes: fec-C00010603: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00042366: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00000935: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00003418: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00027466: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00075820: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-schedule-e: ok (normalized independent-expenditure rows appended); fec-electoral-communications: ok (normalized electioneering and communication-cost rows appended)

sources.description: Public financing and voucher bridge rows for direct program participation and public-fund share diagnostics.
sources.requestTemplate: PUBLIC_FINANCING_SOURCE_NATIVE=1 with nyc-public-financing and seattle-democracy-vouchers source-native fetchers, or PUBLIC_FINANCING_LIVE_CSV=/path/to/program-export.csv ./scripts/fetch-public-financing.sh --live
sources.statusNotes: public-financing: ok (NYC CFB public-financing rows; Seattle Democracy Voucher rows)

sources.description: Explicit dark-money rows from a configured source export or IRS EO BMF 501(c)(4)/(c)(6) opaque-capacity proxy rows; donor identities remain unobserved.
sources.requestTemplate: DARK_MONEY_SOURCE_NATIVE=1 python3 scripts/fetch-source-data.py irs-dark-money-capacity --output data/raw/dark-money.csv or DARK_MONEY_LIVE_CSV=/path/to/export.csv ./scripts/fetch-dark-money.sh --live
sources.statusNotes: dark-money: ok (normalized IRS EO BMF opaque-capacity proxy rows written)

sources.description: EPA 2024 Regulations.gov/Federal Register rulemaking docket and document slice.
sources.statusNotes: regulations-gov: ok (normalized rows appended); federal-register: ok (normalized rows appended)

sources.description: EPA fiscal-year 2024 USAspending award panel for procurement concentration, SAM/FPDS bridge identifiers, competition, modification, and firewall moments.
sources.statusNotes: usaspending: ok (normalized EPA award rows written)

sources.description: Multi-agency fiscal-year 2024 USAspending top-award bridge for high-value procurement concentration and latest-transaction modification diagnostics; kept separate from the EPA calibration slice and action-panel denominator.
sources.requestTemplate: USASPENDING_AGENCIES='Environmental Protection Agency,Department of Energy,Department of the Interior,Department of Agriculture,Department of Transportation,Department of Defense' USASPENDING_PAGE_SIZE=25 USASPENDING_MAX_PAGES=1 USASPENDING_TREAT_LATEST_TRANSACTION_AS_MODIFICATION=1 python3 scripts/fetch-source-data.py usaspending --output data/raw/usaspending-procurement-bridge.csv
sources.statusNotes: usaspending-procurement-bridge: ok (normalized multi-agency procurement bridge rows written)

sources.description: Stratified six-agency USAspending transaction/action panel for action-level procurement concentration and modification diagnostics; rows are deduplicated and kept separate from award rows, top-award bridge rows, and SAM.gov Contract Awards rows.
sources.requestTemplate: USASPENDING_AGENCIES='Environmental Protection Agency,Department of Energy,Department of the Interior,Department of Agriculture,Department of Transportation,Department of Defense' USASPENDING_ACTION_PERIOD_BUCKETS=monthly USASPENDING_ACTION_TRANSACTION_PAGE_SIZE=25 USASPENDING_ACTION_TRANSACTION_MAX_PAGES=1 USASPENDING_ACTION_TRANSACTION_SORT_SPECS='Mod:asc;Transaction Amount:desc' python3 scripts/fetch-source-data.py usaspending-actions --output data/raw/usaspending-procurement-actions.csv
sources.statusNotes: usaspending-procurement-actions: ok (normalized USAspending procurement action rows written)

sources.description: Optional SAM.gov Contract Awards action panel for PIID/UEI, competition, modification, award-date, and contracting-department diagnostics; kept separate from USAspending action rows so procurement provenance remains auditable.
sources.requestTemplate: SAM_CONTRACT_AWARDS_SOURCE_NATIVE=1 SAM_API_KEY=... python3 scripts/fetch-source-data.py sam-contract-awards --output data/raw/sam-contract-awards.csv

sources.description: Normalized revolving-door source panel from a licensed/exported CSV or LDA covered-position derivation, with fixture fallback.
sources.statusNotes: revolving-door: ok (derived normalized covered-position rows from LDA source)

sources.description: Normalized nonprofit, 527, think-tank, campaign-intermediary, and association panel from NYC CFB, IRS EO BMF, IRS POFD Form 8872, ProPublica, OpenSecrets, or curated source exports.
sources.requestTemplate: INTERMEDIARY_SOURCE_NATIVE=1 with nyc-intermediaries, irs-eo-bmf, and irs-527 source-native fetchers, or INTERMEDIARY_LIVE_CSV=/path/to/export.csv ./scripts/fetch-intermediaries.sh --live
sources.statusNotes: intermediary: ok (NYC CFB intermediary rows; IRS EO BMF nonprofit/association capacity rows; IRS POFD Form 8872 527 rows)
